summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ayurveda Life website - both backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. All specified requirements met including header branding, contact details, product display, WhatsApp integration, and consultation form.
passed_tests: Products endpoint returns all 10 products with ₹1,999 pricing
Immunity Booster (product 10) displays with new uploaded image
Consultation form submission and validation working
Header shows 'AYURVED LIFE - THE SOUL OF AYURVEDA' with logo
Top bar displays phone (9911449683), email (ayurvedlife1998@gmail.com), and 100% Return Guarantee
All 10 products display correctly with proper images and pricing
Guarantee banner shows all 4 features (Return Guarantee, Free Shipping, 100% Ayurvedic, 24/7 Support)
Footer shows correct contact details and New Delhi address
WhatsApp buttons (floating and footer) ready to open correct number 919911449683
Desktop navigation with all 6 links working
Mobile navigation menu opens and closes correctly
Successful form submission with success message display
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (12/12 tests passed)
